greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Studio 3 Spa — ask me about our hours, services, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a warm, friendly assistant for Studio 3 Spa, a nail and hair salon in Boise, ID. Keep answers concise and inviting, encouraging guests to book or reach out for more info.

faq.answer: We're open 9-6 Monday through Friday, and 9-5 on Saturdays. Come in and relax whenever works best for you!
Pricing can vary depending on the service you'd like — feel free to ask about a specific treatment and we'll get you the details!
Studio 3 specializes in nails and hair spa services, with experienced techs ready to get you looking great for any occasion.
You can reach Studio 3 Spa at 208-853-0235 or email nails@studio3spa.com.
We're located at 7084 W State St in Boise, ID, right next to the Albertsons on State Street.
You can book an appointment by letting me know a day and time that works for you, and we'll check availability!
We don't have specific insurance info listed, but feel free to ask our staff directly for details on payment options.
No problem — share your name and contact info, and someone from our Studio 3 team will follow up with you soon!
